chunks.text: Search Arena: Analyzing Search-Augmented Large Language Models (EECS-2025-177) by Patrick Wu, Jiayi Pan, Xinyan Hu, Wei-Lin Chiang, Anastasios Angelopoulos, Trevor Darrell, Narges Norouzi and Joseph Gonzalez.
